data.name: Localization.Main.MainView.Subtitle
data.value: Switch cultures at runtime and verify formatted, fixed-culture, and module-scoped resources.

data.name: Localization.Main.MainView.ProviderDescription
data.value: The active plugin normalizes resources behind ILangPlugin.

data.name: Localization.Main.MainView.StorageDescription
data.value: Files or compiled resources are loaded once and cached by culture.

data.name: Localization.Main.MainView.FallbackDescription
data.value: Missing translations return the default-culture value first, then the original key.

data.name: Localization.Main.MainView.BindingRefresh
data.value: Changing the culture raises CultureChanged and refreshes every I18n binding.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ResourcePipelineView.Description
data.value: Language files are parsed into culture dictionaries and shared by XAML and C# callers.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ResourcePipelineView.FormatSupport
data.value: JSON, XML, and RESX providers share one public API.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ResourcePipelineView.HotSwitch
data.value: Culture changes are applied without recreating the window.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ResourcePipelineView.Fallback
data.value: Default culture fallback keeps the UI readable when a translation is missing.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ResourcePipelineView.StrongKeys
data.value: Generated constants remove handwritten resource keys from views.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ValidationView.Description
data.value: The sample exercises formatted strings, module namespaces, fixed cultures, and runtime switching.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ValidationView.MissingKeyPolicy
data.value: Unknown keys remain visible as the key text for fast diagnostics.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ValidationView.ThreadCulture
data.value: CurrentCulture and CurrentUICulture are synchronized for the active thread and new threads.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ValidationView.EmbeddedResources
data.value: Plugins can load resources from additional assemblies.

data.name: Localization.DevelopModule.ValidationView.AnalyzerSupport
data.value: The Analysis package can generate constants during compilation.
